title: GH #23: group/command-scoped --help in bee.mjs dispatcher
action: In templates/bee.mjs main(): when the flag section (rest) contains --help, resolve the leading tokens as usual; if the resolved commandName matches a registry entry OR is a group prefix with registry entries (name === commandName or name startsWith commandName + '.'), render help filtered to those entries (reuse publicManifestEntries/renderHelpText shapes; --json emits {schema_version, commands:[filtered]}), exit 0. A token matching NO entry and NO group prefix keeps today's fallback behavior exactly (DA5 bijection asserts those stderr lines byte-exact). Add test_bee_cli.mjs cases: `state --help --json` exit 0 + parseable subset containing state.set; `cells --help` text exit 0; `state handoff --help` scoped to state.handoff.*; unknown group + --help still errors. Then run node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply to sync .bee/bin mirror. Commit: fix(cli): group-scoped --help (GH #23) [ghf-1].

truths: bee <group> --help exits 0 for every registered group
artifacts: test assertions for json+text group help

trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"Before fix: node .bee/bin/bee.mjs state --help --json exited 1 with stdout {\"error\":\"Unknown command \\\"(missing)\\\". Use: set, gate, worker, scribing-run, start-feature, lanes, session, handoff, advisor-ref.\"} — no group-scoped help existed for any command group, only bare bee --help worked.","green_evidence":"After fix: node .bee/bin/bee.mjs state --help --json exits 0 and returns {schema_version, commands:[...state.* only...]}; test_bee_cli.mjs 210 passed/0 failed (adds 4 new cases); scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs 4/4 passed."}
trace.verify_output: test_bee_cli.mjs: 210 passed, 0 failed; test_lib_mirror.mjs: 4/4 passed; bee state --help --json now exits 0 (previously exit 1 unknown-command)

checks.evidence: git show ee29c0a bee.mjs:+4098-4118 new block returns 0 for filtered group; test_bee_cli asserts state/cells/state-handoff --help all exit 0 (212/0)
guard fires only when commandName resolves AND rest.includes('--help'); bogusgroup --help still exit 1 Unknown command
GROUP_USAGE_FALLBACKS at bee.mjs:3736 not in diff hunks
diff reuses --help/--json parsing; no new flag tokens
